  as={"h1"}

</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/events/{idOrSlug}/admin/orders/{orderId}/invoice"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Download invoice PDF for an admin-created order.
